column5:
movies where it's just night or for the most of it and someone's just confused for the whole time. Well, i just watch them when I'm not able to sleep and I end up not sleeping at all so do give em a shot :)
I don't know why but these movie definitely hit the spot, maybe they give me a false yet comforting sense of freedom which I'll never have in my life, or maybe i project myself into the charectors, I just really don't know but guess what that's me, unapologetically me. see ya :)) also sidenote this list reminds me of that harry styles song, we've been doin all these late night, talkin... Ayyyayayyyyy.
